title: pleopeltis bakeri
intro: Pleopeltis bakeri, also known as Baker's polypody, is a species of epiphytic fern native to Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pleopeltis bakeri include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using its extract as a topical treatment.
